author: Fabrizio Milo
name: LoRA TTT + Better HParams
blurb: Same LoRA-TTT code path as 2026-03-17_LoRA_TTT, but with better defaults: 8x768 GQA, seq_len 2048, 262K-token batch, logit softcap 10, lower LR defaults (0.03/0.02/0.02), and beta1 0.70. submission.json is aggregated from the saved run logs.
